title: Angels Cores
wikitext:
[]: Angels Cores Post by Sachi » Thu Oct 18, 2007 4:17 am ok, supposedly all the Angels have cores right? thats their power source ok, well where exactly are they located on all the different Angels for most of them, its obvious. but for others like Ramiel, didnt they say that her was located in the very center of her diamond-shaped body? and Gaghiels was in the back of his throught well where, was Liliths, Armisiel, Arael, Kawaro ect...

[]: Post by felineki » Thu Oct 18, 2007 5:44 am First, the core is not the power source. The S2 Organ is. The core is the container of the being's soul (this becomes pretty apparent with regard to the Evas). Arael's core is between the two little wings underneath the body. There are one or two shots in the final episode that you can see it if you REALLY strain your eyes and run screenshots through hundreds of filters, but the production drawings make it much clearer. There's no indication or reason to assume Lilith has a core. Lilith and Adam & Co are two completely different breeds, after all. Kaworu is apparently a freakish hybrid created when Lilim (aka normal human, you & me) DNA came into contact with Adam. Considering this, as well as as how his bodily form ended up being pretty much indistinguishable from a Lilim, there's no reason to assume he has a core.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Oct 18, 2007 12:21 pm It would seem likely that Shinji would have clued in soon enough if Kaworu had a visible core at the solar plexus.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 18, 2007 5:41 pm That said, cores don't need to be visible.

[]: Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Oct 18, 2007 8:00 pm It's not certain whether Lilith even had a core. They could be a feature unique to ADOs, and as such, perhaps Kaworu too, in the form of a "Lilim" also went without one.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 18, 2007 8:07 pm Lilith no, she is a homo sapien after all. Kaworu being a freak hybrid could go either way really. Though since he reads as an Angel I'd lean towards he did.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Thu Oct 18, 2007 8:46 pm Actually, it's hard to say if even all ADOs have a core. Adam and many of them did, but some of them, such as the amorphous Bardiel and Armisael, don't seem to have one. Ireul is a total contradiction to the rest, and does not appear to have one either. Matariel died very easily and so may not have had one, and even Sandalphon may not have had one (Or it might be under the left "eye", but there's no telling how Asuka figured that out). However, the first two are the real confusing ones as far as having a core is concerned. Lilith appears not to have had a core, just like all the Lilin that descended from her.

[]: Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Thu Oct 18, 2007 8:57 pm Given the context from the Evas the core is a container for their souls so I'd say they* probably do have them. *they being all Adam derived Angels

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Oct 19, 2007 9:10 am UrsusArctos wrote: (Or it might be under the left "eye", but there's no telling how Asuka figured that out).

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Oct 19, 2007 9:57 pm Oh, stupid me, Eva-tachi have Radar and Sonar as well!

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Oct 20, 2007 3:55 am Well, the EVA series have no external ears or apparent eyes...

[]: Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Oct 20, 2007 6:57 am The modern world already has hidden and undetected cameras as well as infra-red. I'm not surprised if the 2015 society has sensors undetectable by the naked eye. . Perhaps, SEELE could have developed some kind of radar (I doubt that they will be using outdated technology in the year 2015, since they have already built gigantic beasts). Maybe they use some kind of sensory mechanism that can detect objects lying in front of them as if they had eyes. Big red writing is for other people

[]: Post by Nightquest » Fri Jun 11, 2010 7:31 pm * Sorry for "resurrecting" an old and inactive topic, but I didn't want to re-post. Well, do whatever you think is right with it... This is something I've always wanted to know. In fact, it really scares me: It's the core that we see in the NGE opening. It scares me because of all those "rusty" metal things over there.. I thought that was inside of the core... but yesterday I watched de Rebuild 2.22, and as we know "that scene"... SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Angels Cores Post by TheLobe » Fri Jun 11, 2010 11:39 pm Sachi wrote: well where, was Liliths, Armisiel, Arael, Kawaro ect...

[]: Post by NemZ » Sat Jun 12, 2010 12:42 am Did Bardiel have a core? Armisarael? Iruel? It seems to be a common trait but not a required one.

[]: Post by Legendary » Sat Jun 12, 2010 12:53 am Bardiel's core has been hypothesized to be in the Entry Plug. Armisael has one in Eva 2, for what it's worth. Ireul is the oddball, but there's no reason to assume there WASN'T a microscopic core.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 12, 2010 9:08 am Nightquest wrote: ... the core was just empty.

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Jun 12, 2010 2:58 pm nor was kaworu as he was a clone of a human, with an angels soul

[]: Post by Nightquest » Sat Jun 12, 2010 4:10 pm Reichu wrote: The image on the core's surface looks distorted and rounded, so it's my guess that it's a reflection of something.

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 12, 2010 5:45 pm Nightquest wrote: So... I suppose those "metal pipes" reflected on the core's surface are part of the NERV building.
